data.name: Convenient Encounters
data.detailed_description:
You never know what might happen on a casual visit to a concenience store! Play to find out!

Convenient Encounters is a third-person erotic adventure roleplaying game with steaming hot cutscenes and easy to grasp controls.
Experience a story with multiple outcomes, Interact with characters and environments, make the right choices and unlock new hidden scenes...

Features
  • 3D
  • Fully Animated
  • Voice acting

Experience a story with multiple outcomes, Interact with characters and environments, make the right choices and unlock new hidden scenes...

Features

  • Voice acting
data.short_description: You never know what might happen on a casual visit to a concenience store! Play through this erotic roleplaying game to find out! Experience the story, Interact with characters and environments, unlock new scenes based on your choices...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Modern CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Modern graphics card
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
